name: Will Coleman
bio_note: Biz-leaning engineer. Founded Echoblast after connecting with Howell on Hacker News GPU-scheduling thread. Stays CEO through IPO + present.

name: Mark Howell
education: BS EE, Georgia Tech (2019); MS CS, Stanford (2023, part-time)
bio_note: Distributed systems / Kubernetes + GPU scheduling. The technical center of gravity. Known internally as 'Howell' to disambiguate from Mark Leonard.

name: Angela Holmes
bio_note: Business ops and early GTM. Managed Shenzhen export-control incident pre-GC-hire. Promoted to President post-Series C. Leads Tier 1 strategic accounts personally.

name: Mark Leonard
bio_note: Networking + low-level CUDA. Non-managerial by choice — runs a 6-person architecture team reporting to CTO. Known internally as 'Leonard'. 80% time arrangement since 2031. Advisory role at Kinesis Labs (Princeton robotics startup).

name: Luis Tran
bio_note: Hired 2 months pre-Series A. Promoted to CFO at Series B. Subject of expense-audit arcs in 2031 and 2033. CFO succession planning initiated Q4 2033.

name: Robert Graves
bio_note: Replaced Carmen Russell's player/coach role. Promoted to CRO at IPO. Leads three GTM segments: Enterprise, Startups, Research/Academia.

name: Miguel Black
bio_note: Runs Series C process, sets up IPO-readiness committee 2029. Oversees AI safety team of 8.

name: Diego Baker
role: Chief People Officer (was Head of Recruiting Jan 2027)
bio_note: Scales headcount 80→400 through Series B. Promoted to CPO 2028.

name: Charles Flores
bio_note: Built the first scheduler. Promoted to VP Engineering Nov 2027. 14 teams report to him.

name: Jacob Evans
role: Head of Fleet Reliability (was first SRE)
bio_note: Writes the on-call playbook that survives to IPO. Now leads 35-person reliability org. Nearly resigned after EBL-OR1 outage 2032; retained with package.

name: Carmen Russell
bio_note: Closes first foundation-model-lab contract early 2026. Moved to Solutions Engineering lead when Robert Graves joined as VP Sales. Co-leads training-platform eng team with Tomás Morrison.

name: Roman Munoz
bio_note: Negotiates Sterling VA (DC-1) and subsequent DC leases. Subject of CoreWeave IP-theft arc — brought competitor docs on personal device. Received formal written warning; stayed.

name: Aria Lawrence
bio_note: Owns API + console surface through Series C. Transitions to customer-success leadership post-IPO. Leads Tier 1-2 account management + broader CS function.

name: Tomás Morrison
role: Staff Engineer, ML Platform (first ML platform hire)
bio_note: Builds the training-cluster abstraction. Co-leads training-platform engineering team with Carmen Russell.

name: Matthew Stewart
bio_note: Hired for pre-IPO compliance work. Runs cyber-incident-response.

name: Youssef Wilson
bio_note: Joined at IPO. Manages sell-side + institutional relationships.

name: Akira Wright
bio_note: Seed-lead partner representative. Observer seat.

name: Steven Morris
bio_note: Series A lead partner. Voting board seat.

name: Isabella Edwards
role: Board Director (General Catalyst), Comp Committee Chair
bio_note: Series B lead partner. Voting board seat. Chairs Compensation Committee post-IPO.

name: Stephen Hawkins
bio_note: First independent director at Series C. Chairs Nom/Gov. Voted to continue Atlas acquisition talks (minority).

name: Martin Ward
bio_note: Second independent director at Series D. Chairs Audit Committee. Voted to continue Atlas acquisition talks (minority).

name: Lila Cole
bio_note: Series C crossover representative. Observer seat.

name: Elijah Patterson
bio_note: Series D strategic representative. Observer seat (SEC conflict precluded voting).

name: John Rose
bio_note: Series B co-investor representative. Observer seat.

name: James Coleman
bio_note: Held 0.3% equity stake in Texas colocation partner. Divested Oct 2026 per pre-Series-A cleanup.

name: Elena Wade
bio_note: Recurring fictional journalist across adapted Bloomberg articles.

name: Eric Ford
bio_note: Recurring fictional journalist. Covers neocloud funding rounds.

name: Walter Park
bio_note: Covers Echoblast post-IPO. Recurring sell-side analyst voice.

name: Claudia Murphy
bio_note: Covers Echoblast post-IPO. Initiating coverage.

name: Samir Watkins
bio_note: Stratechery-style independent voice. Covers neocloud ecosystem.
